ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school" TEXT /* School or institution the team represents */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golf course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the golf course */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the golf course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the golf course */,
  "holes" INTEGER /* Number of holes in the golf course */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the course was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team participating in the match */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team participating in the match */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course where the match is held */,
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match type (e.g., friendly, league, tournament) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, cancelled) */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., singles, foursomes, four-ball) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the match was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the match was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_type_id") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_b_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the match type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the match type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the referee */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the referee */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the referee was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the referee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-referee assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee assigned to the match */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the match-referee assignment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the match-referee assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Handicap of the player */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the player was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_players" (
  "match_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-player assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player assigned to the match */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., playing, substitute, injured) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the match */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the match-player assignment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the match-player assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "match_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team_b_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the match result was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the match result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_winner_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, referee, team captain, player) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the notification is related to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., match schedule, match result, system update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_tables" (
  "league_table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league table entry */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the team */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the league table entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the league table entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_tables_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
